title: Buttery Italian Mozzarella Lasagna
description: A buttery, fluffy, comforting lasagna that marries Italian tradition with Venezuelan warmth, featuring melty mozzarella and a silky ricotta sauce.
instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F). Lightly grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Sauté onion until translucent (~5 min). Add minced garlic, cook 1 min.
Stir in sautéed spinach, cook 2 min. Season with salt and pepper. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
In a mixing bowl, combine ricotta, heavy cream, beaten egg, a pinch of salt and pepper. Mix until smooth.
Spread a thin layer of the ricotta mixture in the greased dish. Place 3 lasagna sheets over it.
Spread a layer of the spinach mixture, then scatter 120g of sliced mozzarella. Repeat layers twice more (ricotta, spinach, mozzarella, and sheets), ending with a layer of mozzarella on top.
Melt butter in a small saucepan and drizzle over the top layer to create a golden crust.
Cover dish with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and bake another 10-15 minutes until the top is bubbly and golden.
Let lasagna rest 10 minutes before slicing to allow layers to set.
